general.name: Security and Privacy: General - Zoom Room
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F153EE25-5811-4D0A-B16D-D9DF8E2BFBE8</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F153EE25-5811-4D0A-B16D-D9DF8E2BFBE8</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Security and Privacy: General - Zoom Room</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>ScreenSaver</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>969BBD48-A42F-4BEA-B5A1-1EED1E014D60</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.screensaver</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>969BBD48-A42F-4BEA-B5A1-1EED1E014D60</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>askForPassword</key><false/></dict></array></dict></plist>
